description_long: This is a rectangular wallet with a fold-over flap design, featuring a vibrant, multicolored floral and mandala-inspired pattern on the upper section of the front. The lower portion and the back are made of textured brown leather or faux leather, providing a warm, earthy contrast to the colorful top. A metallic clasp is centrally located on the front flap, serving as the main closure mechanism, and a small metallic plate above it is engraved with the word 'handmade.' The wallet includes a long, matching brown strap attached at both ends, allowing it to be carried over the shoulder or across the body. The sides reveal the wallet's slim profile and the continuation of the patterned and brown leather materials. The overall construction appears sturdy and well-crafted, with no visible signs of wear or damage.
description: A rectangular wallet with a colorful floral-mandala pattern on the front flap, brown leather body, metallic clasp, and a long brown strap.
description_view_0: Side view showing the slim profile, brown strap, and the edge of the patterned flap.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the vibrant patterned flap, metallic clasp, 'handmade' plate, and the brown lower section.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the slimness, brown strap, and the edge of the wallet.
description_view_3: Back view showing the plain brown leather surface and the attachment points of the strap.
attribute_brand_logo: A small metallic plate on the front flap is engraved with the word 'handmade.'
attribute_decorative_pattern: Multicolored floral and mandala-inspired pattern on the front flap.
attribute_attachment_or_chain: Long brown strap attached at both ends for carrying over the shoulder or across the body.
